Home / Service Areas / Norman

Driveway paving in Norman, OK

Trusted local professionals serving Norman and surrounding communities

Serving Norman, OK

Precision Pavement Maintenance LLC is proud to serve the vibrant community of Norman, home to the University of Oklahoma. We recognize the specific paving requirements of both residential and commercial properties in this dynamic city. We offer a wide range of driveway paving services, from new installations to repairs and maintenance. Our team is committed to providing durable, aesthetically pleasing, and cost-effective solutions that enhance the value and curb appeal of your property. Whether you're near campus or in a residential neighborhood, we're ready to meet your paving needs. We offer a full range of paving services, including asphalt paving, concrete paving, driveway repairs, sealcoating and more. Our team is dedicated to providing quality workmanship and excellent customer service.

Norman is a lively college town with a rich history and a strong sense of community. Its vibrant atmosphere and diverse population make it a great place to live and visit.

Driveway paving Services in Norman

Asphalt Driveway Paving

Durable and cost-effective asphalt driveways built to withstand Oklahoma's climate.

Learn more →

Concrete Driveway Paving

Durable and customizable concrete driveways for Oklahoma City homes.

Learn more →

Driveway Repair & Resurfacing

Fix cracks and restore your driveway's appearance with our expert repair services.

Learn more →

Driveway Sealing

Protect your asphalt driveway from the elements with our professional sealing services.

Learn more →

Driveway Grading & Excavation

Proper grading and excavation for a solid driveway foundation.

Learn more →

Driveway Extensions

Expand your parking space with a professionally installed driveway extension.

Learn more →

Need Driveway paving in Norman?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Norman and the surrounding area.
